creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
Once again, sorry.



On 09/01/09 14:54 -0500, Wesley Shields wrote:
> Rodrigo,
> 
> Is it possible to generate a patch against the current version of the
> port.  The patch you have submitted is against a version that is almost
> 2 years old.  Figuring out exactly what you intend to change as it
> applies to the current version of the port is slowing down this effort.
> If you can update your patch to be against what is currently in the
> ports tree that would help.  Thanks!
> 
> -- WXS
